title: rubus afrotropicus
intro: Rubus afrotropicus, also known as the African black raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus afrotropicus include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in Africa.
